heading: Clinical trial guidance for antibiotic drugs
label: 360a Clinical trial guidance for antibiotic drugs

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 1 year after , the Secretary shall issue guidance for the conduct of clinical trials with respect to antibiotic drugs, including antimicrobials to treat acute bacterial sinusitis, acute bacterial otitis media, and acute bacterial exacerbation of chronic bronchitis. Such guidance shall indicate the appropriate models and valid surrogate markers.September 27, 2007

children.heading: Review
children.label: b Review
children.text: Not later than 5 years after , the Secretary shall review and update the guidance described under subsection (a) to reflect developments in scientific and medical information and technology.September 27, 2007
